ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (GRANTED IN PART)

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER V. KRIVOSHEYEV'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED IN PART. JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS SHOWN THAT MOST OF HIS INCOME IS NEEDED FOR HIS SUPPORT. HOWEVER, JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED TO PAY $100 PER PAY PERIOD TOWARDS SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IN THIS CASE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-21-2013 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

calendar.matters:
Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER V. KRIVOSHEYEV'S Claim Of Exemption is Granted in part. Judgment debtor has shown that most of his income is needed for his support. However, judgment debtor is ordered to pay $100 per pay period towards satisfaction of judgment in this case. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
PLAINTIFFS FIRST SELECT, INC. AND EASY LOAN CORPORATION'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption - The motion is transferred to be heard in Department 302 at 9:30 a.m. on the same date. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =302/MJM

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Aug-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Alexander V. Krivosheyev, appearing in Propria Persona; no other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2001 Sweep; Adjudicated
